name: SAP Fieldglass SAP Fieldglass Background Check API Examples
description: Request examples for the SAP Fieldglass SAP Fieldglass Background Check API

examples.summary: Provides confirmation of a background check request
examples.description: Posts a background check request acknowledgment to SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: JSON format is supported. This value is application/json.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access.

examples.summary: Provides results for the work order
examples.description: Posts results for a specific background check request.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: JSON format is supported. This value is application/json.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access.

parameters.name: clientReferenceId
parameters.description: Globally-unique SAP Fieldglass identifier of the object. This is the Work Order ID used for the drill-down call in SAP Fieldglass. It is not visible to end users.
